seasonality: Volume and revenue are event-driven, spiking during Solana ecosystem bull runs and new token launches (e.g., meme-coin seasons), but otherwise inconsistent quarter-to-quarter.
rationale: DefiLlama shows Orca's 30-day fees running roughly $900K/month as of late Q1 2025, implying ~$10.8M annualized protocol revenue; TVL sits near $180M, giving a P/TVL of ~0.11x at a ~$200M fully-diluted market cap. The protocol peaked in late 2024 during the Solana meme-coin surge and volumes have since moderated, placing it in a decelerating trend relative to that peak. Real yield to ORCA stakers is not formally distributed on-chain in a trackable APR format, so real_yield_apr_pct and inflationary_yield_apr_pct are null pending confirmed tokenomics data.
